canonical_answer: A man in a dark blue military dress uniform kneels on a basketball court floor to pet a golden retriever dog wearing a red service vest. A bald man in a blue shirt holds the dog's leash nearby while another man in a black suit stands and claps his hands. A woman holds up a white basketball jersey with orange trim in the background near digital screens displaying Madison Square Garden.
